title: Phase 7B Proof Bundle — Ingress Unification
gate: Phase 7B must close with proof before Phase 7C starts

prerequisite_merges.title: P7B-02b: Cut alert-agent onto governed adapter
prerequisite_merges.status: superseded — cutover was atomic with UTV2-512 in PR #262

assertions.claim: Scanner no longer creates new picks through direct submission

evidence.grep_submissions: grep '/api/submissions' apps/api/src/system-pick-scanner.ts returns only a comment (line 7) — zero executable calls
evidence.interface_change: SystemPickScanOptions no longer has apiUrl, apiKey, or fetchImpl fields
evidence.tests: 9/9 scanner tests pass — verify market_universe writes, not HTTP calls

assertions.claim: Alert-agent no longer creates new picks through direct submission

evidence.grep_submissions: grep '/api/submissions' apps/api/src/alert-submission.ts returns only a comment (line 5) — zero executable calls
evidence.interface_change: createAlertUpstreamAdapter replaces createAlertSubmissionPublisher — no apiUrl, apiKey, fetchImpl
evidence.agent_wiring: alert-agent.ts passes marketUniverse from repository bundle instead of HTTP config
evidence.main_cleanup: apps/alert-agent/src/main.ts no longer passes UNIT_TALK_API_URL or UNIT_TALK_API_KEY_SUBMITTER
evidence.tests: 9/9 alert-submission tests + 1/1 simulation test pass — verify market_universe writes

assertions.claim: New scanner/alert outputs flow through the governed upstream layer

evidence.scanner_provider_key: system-pick-scanner writes market_universe rows via upsertMarketUniverse (same contract as materializer)
evidence.alert_provider_key: alert-submission writes market_universe rows with provider_key='alert-agent' (apps/api/src/alert-submission.ts:82)
evidence.downstream_pipeline_intact: board-scan-service.ts, candidate-scoring-service.ts, and board-pick-writer.ts all reference marketUniverse — governed pipeline is unchanged
evidence.pipeline_chain: market_universe → board_scan (pick_candidates) → candidate_scoring → ranked_selection → board_construction → board_pick_writer (picks)

assertions.claim: No regressions in human/operator-controlled pick creation

evidence.submission_route_untouched: apps/api/src/routes/submissions.ts not modified in either PR
evidence.human_sources_intact: smart-form, api, discord-bot, feed, system sources still POST to /api/submissions through the unchanged controller
evidence.test_count: 188/188 app tests pass including all submission, lifecycle, and HTTP integration tests
evidence.verify: pnpm verify passes — lint, type-check, build, test, commands all green

assertions.claim: No contract violation around market_universe / universe_id

evidence.no_direct_candidates: grep 'pick_candidates|pickCandidates' in system-pick-scanner.ts and alert-submission.ts returns 0 matches (exit 1)
evidence.universe_id_resolved_downstream: board-scan-service.ts:208 assigns universe_id from universeRow.id — resolved from market_universe rows, not injected by scanner/alert
evidence.natural_key_upsert: Both scanner and alert use market_universe natural-key conflict target (provider_key, provider_event_id, provider_participant_id, provider_market_key) — idempotent by contract

phase_7b_gate_verdict: PASS — all 5 assertions hold. Phase 7B ingress unification is complete.
